title: ByteDance Pauses AI Video Launch Over Copyright Issues
description: ByteDance has reportedly postponed the launch of its new artificial intelligence video-generation model over copyright disputes. According to several news outlets, and as first reported by The Information on Saturday (March 14), the Chinese tech giant made this decision following pushback from major Hollywood studios and streaming platforms. PYMNTS has contacted ByteDance for comment [...]The post ByteDance Pauses AI Video Launch Over Copyright Issues appeared first on PYMNTS.com.
